# REQ-FR-260005: Deployment and release operation model for the public site

- ID: FR-260005
- Class: FR (Functional Requirement)
- Status: Accepted
- Date: 2026-05-21
- Owner: Repository owner

## Statement

The Crystord public site shall use a standardized GitHub Pages deployment model with automatic
deployments from `main`, manual republish capability, explicit build-time config values, and
revert-based rollback.

## Rationale

The project needs stable, low-friction deployment behavior that matches static-site hosting while
preserving a clear canonical public URL and safe rollback path.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Deployment runs automatically on push to `main` and can be manually dispatched.
- Build uses Node 20 and produces static output deployed from `dist`.
- Build-time variables include `PUBLIC_APP_SIGN_IN_URL` and configurable `GITHUB_PAGES_BASE`.
- Canonical public URL target is `https://crystord.com`.
- App sign-in target resolves to `https://app.crystord.com/sign-in` (or configured equivalent).
- Local workflow is documented and uses `npm run dev`, `npm run build`, and `npm run preview`.
- Rollback procedure is revert-and-redeploy.
